description: THE SINGLE MASTER AGENT. Install as ~/.claude/skills/forge-4d/SKILL.md, REPLACING all prior forge-4d files INCLUDING the standalone PRE-FLIGHT.md (now merged in as PART I). tungsten-forge v2.0 discipline still inherited absolutely. PART I is the PRE-FLIGHT -- a PREREQUISITE, ten gates answered in the log with numbers before any result is believed; a skipped gate is P0 and halts the pass. PARTS II-VIII are the Council Thesis: the rocks lifted (triple conditioning +1.138 ATR, day-of-week Friday +1.419 ATR, and honest refutations of long-horizon/path-shape/nonlinear-learners), the catastrophe (-1.204 ATR inversion), and THE LAW OF THE LIVING EDGE -- every conditional edge is real, large, and NON-STATIONARY AT THE SIGN LEVEL; it does not decay, it inverts. Includes the architecture that survives it (phase state machines, flip detector, sign-agnostic magnitude trading, inversion alarm, survive-the-flip sizing) and the house logging voice.
